cards.text: Sadrazam, şu anda zindanda bekleyen eski defterdar devlet sırlarını sattığı iddiasıyla huzuruma getirildi. İdam fermanını imzalamamı bekliyorum.
cards.investigate_text: Defterdar'ın dosyasına baktın — suçlamaların büyük kısmı Rakip Vezir'den geliyor. Belki siyasi bir tasfiye bu.
cards.text_en: Grand Vizier, the former Treasurer who awaits in the dungeon has been brought before me on charges of selling state secrets. I am awaiting your signature on the execution order.
cards.investigate_text_en: You looked into the Treasurer's file — most of the accusations come from the Rival Vizier. This may be a political purge.
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Hizmetlerinizden memnunum, Sadrazam. Size Rumeli'de bereketli bir tımar bağışlamak istiyorum. Ancak bu arazi şu an başka bir beyin elinde.
cards.text_en: I am pleased with your service, Grand Vizier. I wish to grant you a fertile timar in Rumelia. However, this land is currently held by another governor.
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Bu gece kötü bir rüya gördüm, Sadrazam. Boğaz sular yerine kan akıtıyordu. Şeyhülislam'a mı sorsam, yoksa sizi mi dinlesem?
cards.text_en: I had an ill omen in my sleep last night, Grand Vizier. The Bosphorus ran with blood instead of water. Shall I send for the Şeyhülislam, or shall I hear your counsel?
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Macaristan sınırında bir kale bize meydan okumaya devam ediyor. Bizzat sefere çıkmamı öneriyorum. Siz sarayı idare edersiniz.
cards.text_en: A fortress on the Hungarian border continues to defy us. I propose leading the campaign myself. You will govern the palace in my absence.
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Diğer vezirlerden şikayetler geliyor, Sadrazam. 'Yetkiyi tek elde topluyor' diyorlar. Ne dersiniz?
cards.text_en: Complaints are coming from the other viziers, Grand Vizier. They say you are 'concentrating all power in one hand.' What do you say?
cards.left_text_en: They are right — I will share power
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Paşam, askerlerimiz yeni bir kışla istiyor. Eski yapı çürümüş durumda. Kışı bu hâlde geçirirsek isyan kaçınılmaz.
cards.text_en: Pasha, our soldiers are demanding new barracks. The old structure is rotting. If they endure the winter in these conditions, rebellion is inevitable.
cards.speech_left_en: A hungry soldier's weapon weeps.
cards.speech_right_en: Inform your Sultan — we are pleased.

cards.text: Paşam, üç aydır maaş ödenemedi. Askerler arasında homurdanma var. Birileri kazan kaldırmadan önce haberdar etmek istedim.
cards.text_en: Pasha, wages have gone unpaid for three months. Grumbling spreads among the troops. Act before someone raises the cauldron.
cards.speech_left_en: A hungry soldier's weapon weeps.
cards.speech_right_en: Inform your Sultan — we are pleased.

cards.text: Avrupalı güçler yeni tüfek teknolojisi geliştirdi. Ordumuz geri kalıyor. Büyük bir sipariş vermemizi öneriyorum.
cards.text_en: The European powers have developed new musket technology. Our army is falling behind. I recommend we place a large order.
cards.speech_left_en: A hungry soldier's weapon weeps.
cards.speech_right_en: Inform your Sultan — we are pleased.

cards.text: İki Yeniçeri bölüğü kavga etti, bir asker hayatını kaybetti. Sert bir disiplin önlemi almamı öneriyorum.
cards.text_en: Two Janissary companies clashed — a soldier lost his life. I am recommending strict disciplinary measures.
cards.speech_left_en: A hungry soldier's weapon weeps.
cards.speech_right_en: Inform your Sultan — we are pleased.

cards.text: Kurucu birliklerden bir grup artık yaşlı ve savaşamıyor. Emekliye ayırsam mı, yoksa saygı gereği tutayım mı?
cards.text_en: A group from the founding companies is now too old to fight. Shall I retire them with honor, or keep them in service out of respect?
cards.right_text_en: Let them remain in the corps
cards.speech_left_en: A hungry soldier's weapon weeps.
cards.speech_right_en: Inform your Sultan — we are pleased.

cards.text: Sadrazam Hazretleri, bir Venedikli tüccarın faaliyetleri konusunda fetva talebi var. Şartlı caiz diyebilirim, ama karar sizin.
cards.text_en: Grand Vizier, there is a request for a fatwa concerning the activities of a Venetian merchant. I can issue it as 'conditionally permissible.'
cards.speech_left_en: This is not the path of God, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: So sharia commands — rightly done.

cards.text: Üsküdar'da yeni bir medrese için arazi tahsis edilmesini talep ediyorum. İlim yuvası olmadan devlet temelsiz kalır.
cards.text_en: I am requesting the allocation of land for a new madrasa in Üsküdar. Without a house of learning, the state cannot stand.
cards.speech_left_en: This is not the path of God, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: So sharia commands — rightly done.

cards.text: Saraydaki bir kâtip bid'at içerikli yazılar üretiyor. Zındıklıkla suçlayıp soruşturma açmamı onaylayın.
cards.investigate_text: Kâtibin yazıları incelendiğinde bid'atten çok hiciv içerdiği görülüyor. Asıl hedef Şeyhülislam'ın rakibi olabilir.
cards.text_en: A scribe in the palace is producing writings containing heretical content. Approve the opening of an investigation on charges of heresy.
cards.investigate_text_en: Upon examining the scribe's writings, they appear to contain satire rather than heresy. The real target seems to be someone in the Şeyhülislam's circle.
cards.speech_left_en: This is not the path of God, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: So sharia commands — rightly done.

cards.text: Cuma hutbesine Sultan'ın adının yanına sizin unvanınızın da eklenmesini düşünüyorum. Tarihte emsali var.
cards.text_en: I am considering adding your title alongside the Sultan's in the Friday sermon. There is historical precedent.
cards.speech_left_en: This is not the path of God, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: So sharia commands — rightly done.

cards.text: Vakıf gelirlerinin bir kısmını doğrudan Ulema denetimine almak istiyorum. Bu hem şeffaflık hem de verimlilik sağlar.
cards.text_en: I wish to bring a portion of foundation revenues directly under clergy oversight. This would bring both transparency and efficiency.
cards.speech_left_en: This is not the path of God, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: So sharia commands — rightly done.

cards.text: Efendim, yıl sonu bütçesi açık veriyor. Ya sefere ayrılan payı kısacağız ya da vergi artırımına gideceğiz.
cards.text_en: My lord, the year-end budget is in deficit. We must either cut the campaign allocation or raise taxes.
cards.speech_left_en: You will regret this, my lord.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has found safety.

cards.text: Anadolu tahsildarları geri döndü. Getiri öngörülenin çok altında. Köylüler ödeyemiyor mu yoksa tahsildarlar zimmetleyip mi geliyor?
cards.text_en: The Anatolian tax collectors have returned. The yield is far below projections. Are the villagers unable to pay, or are the collectors pocketing the difference?
cards.speech_left_en: You will regret this, my lord.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has found safety.

cards.text: Cenevizli bankacılar hazineye uygun faizle borç teklif ediyor. Kısa vadede nefes alırız, uzun vadede borcumuz artar.
cards.text_en: Genoese bankers are offering the treasury a loan at favorable interest. We gain breathing room in the short term, but risks mount long term.
cards.speech_left_en: You will regret this, my lord.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has found safety.

cards.text: Galata'da yeni bir pazar kurulması için ruhsat talebi var. Hem esnaf hem hazine kazanır. Ama eski esnaf loncaları itiraz ediyor.
cards.text_en: There is a request for a permit to establish a new market in Galata. Both artisans and the treasury would benefit — but the old guilds object.
cards.speech_left_en: You will regret this, my lord.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has found safety.

cards.text: Boğaz'dan geçen yabancı gemilere uygulanan gümrük vergisi on yıldır değişmedi. İki katına çıkarmayı öneriyorum.
cards.text_en: The customs duty applied to foreign ships passing through the Bosphorus has not changed in ten years. I propose doubling it.
cards.speech_left_en: You will regret this, my lord.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has found safety.

cards.text: Şehzadem için uygun bir gelin adayı buldum. Kırım Hanı'nın kızı. İttifak açısından da değerli. Onayınızı bekliyorum.
cards.speech_right: Bilge bir karar, Allah razı olsun.
cards.text_en: I have found a suitable bride for the prince — the daughter of the Khan of Crimea. Valuable from an alliance standpoint as well. Do you approve?
cards.speech_left_en: You should listen to your mother, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Harem'in yıllık ödeneği yetersiz kalıyor. Kıyafetler, tamirat, hizmetkarların maaşları... Artırım şart.
cards.speech_right: Bilge bir karar, Allah razı olsun.
cards.text_en: The Harem's annual allocation is falling short. Garments, repairs, servants' wages... An increase is necessary.
cards.speech_left_en: You should listen to your mother, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Küçük şehzadenin eğitimi için iki hoca adayı var. Biri Ulema kökenli, biri Acem sarayından gelmiş. Kim uygun?
cards.speech_right: Bilge bir karar, Allah razı olsun.
cards.text_en: There are two tutor candidates for the young prince's education. One is from the clergy, the other has come from the Persian court. Which do you prefer?
cards.speech_left_en: You should listen to your mother, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Haremdeki bir cariye hakkında duyumlar var. Yabancı devletle ilişkili olduğu söyleniyor. Araştıralım mı?
cards.investigate_text: Casuslardan edinilen bilgiye göre cariyer değil, ona yakın bir saray görevlisi şüpheli konumda.
cards.speech_right: Bilge bir karar, Allah razı olsun.
cards.text_en: There are rumors about a concubine in the Harem. She is said to be connected to a foreign power. Let us investigate.
cards.investigate_text_en: According to intelligence, it is not the concubine but a palace official close to her who is suspect.
cards.speech_left_en: You should listen to your mother, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Eski sultanın mühürlü bir vasiyet mektubu ortaya çıktı. Valide Sultan size getirdi. Açılsın mı?
cards.speech_right: Bilge bir karar, Allah razı olsun.
cards.text_en: A sealed testament from the late Sultan has surfaced. The Valide Sultan brought it to you. Should it be opened?
cards.speech_left_en: You should listen to your mother, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Akdeniz'de Cenevizli korsanlar Osmanlı ticaret gemilerimizi vuruyor. Bir müfreze göndereyim mi?
cards.text_en: Genoese pirates are attacking Ottoman merchant vessels in the Mediterranean. Shall I dispatch a detachment?
cards.speech_left_en: The seas are unforgiving, Grand Vizier.
cards.speech_right_en: The fleet is ready, awaiting your orders.

cards.text: Tersanemiz eskidi. Altı yeni kadırga inşa edebiliriz ama büyük bir yatırım gerekiyor.
cards.text_en: Our shipyard has aged. We can build six new galleys, but it requires a major investment.
cards.speech_left_en: The seas are unforgiving, Grand Vizier.
cards.speech_right_en: The fleet is ready, awaiting your orders.

cards.text: Venedik'in Girit'teki limanına gece baskını düzenleyebiliriz. Resmî savaş ilanı olmadan. Risk var ama kazanç büyük.
cards.text_en: We could launch a night raid on Venice's harbor in Crete — without a formal declaration of war. There is risk, but also great gain.
cards.speech_left_en: The seas are unforgiving, Grand Vizier.
cards.speech_right_en: The fleet is ready, awaiting your orders.

cards.text: Büyük fırtınada üç gemimiz hasar gördü, biri battı. Acil tamir ödeneği gerekiyor.
cards.text_en: Three of our ships were damaged in a great storm; one sank. Emergency repair funds are needed.
cards.speech_left_en: The seas are unforgiving, Grand Vizier.
cards.speech_right_en: The fleet is ready, awaiting your orders.

cards.text: Malta Şövalyeleri'ne karşı Napoli'den ortak harekât teklifi geldi. Osmanlı'ya alışılmadık bir müttefik.
cards.text_en: Naples has proposed a joint operation against the Knights of Malta — an unusual potential ally for the Ottomans.
cards.speech_left_en: The seas are unforgiving, Grand Vizier.
cards.speech_right_en: The fleet is ready, awaiting your orders.

cards.text: Venedik Cumhuriyeti adına İstanbul'da depo ve temsilcilik hakkı talep ediyorum. Karşılığında ipek ve cam eşya.
cards.text_en: On behalf of the Republic of Venice, I am requesting rights to a warehouse and representation in Istanbul. In return, silk and glass.
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Habsburglu elçi olarak Macaristan sınırındaki köy anlaşmazlığını çözmek için arabuluculuk öneriyorum.
cards.text_en: As an envoy from the Habsburgs, I propose mediation to resolve the village dispute on the Hungarian border.
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Fransa Kralı ortak düşman Habsburglar'a karşı gizli bir savunma anlaşması öneriyor. Kimse bilmeyecek.
cards.text_en: The King of France proposes a secret defensive pact against our common enemy, the Habsburgs. No one need know.
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Esir takası teklifindeyim. On Osmanlı askerine karşılık beş Avrupalı soylu. Üstelik onurlu bir törenle.
cards.text_en: I propose a prisoner exchange: ten Ottoman soldiers for five European nobles. With an honorable ceremony, no less.
cards.left_text_en: We do not accept the ratio
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Hint Okyanusu'ndaki baharat ticareti için garip bir teklif: Portekiz gemileri Osmanlı bayrağıyla seyreder, kâr paylaşılır.
cards.text_en: A peculiar offer regarding the spice trade in the Indian Ocean: Portuguese ships would sail under Ottoman colors — on paper only.
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Divanda duyuldu: rakibiniz Sultan'a sizi şikâyet etmiş. 'Hazineyi harcıyor' demiş. Karşı hamle yapacak mısınız?
cards.text_en: It was heard in the Divan: your rival has formally complained to the Sultan. 'He is draining the treasury,' he said. How will you respond?
cards.speech_left_en: You have made a mistake — you will remember it.
cards.speech_right_en: Unexpected understanding, Pasha.

cards.text: Rakibiniz kulağınıza yaklaşıp bir sırrı fısıldadı: Şeyhülislam'ın yolsuzluk yaptığını iddia ediyor. Güvenilir mi bu adam?
cards.investigate_text: Rakip Vezir'in bu bilgiyi neden size verdiği şüpheli. Şeyhülislam'ı zayıflatmak onun çıkarına.
cards.text_en: Your rival leaned close and whispered a secret: he claims the Şeyhülislam is corrupt. What will you do with this claim?
cards.investigate_text_en: It is suspicious why the Rival Vizier is bringing this to you. He may be trying to weaken the Şeyhülislam — while setting a trap for you.
cards.speech_left_en: You have made a mistake — you will remember it.
cards.speech_right_en: Unexpected understanding, Pasha.

cards.text: Rakibiniz Sultan'dan yeni bir unvan aldı: 'Müşavir-i Hâs'. Divan'daki ağırlığı arttı. Sessiz mi kalıyorsunuz?
cards.text_en: Your rival has received a new title from the Sultan: 'Chief Advisor.' His weight in the Divan has grown. Will you remain silent?
cards.left_text_en: A title does not move me
cards.right_text_en: Request a title for yourself as well
cards.speech_left_en: You have made a mistake — you will remember it.
cards.speech_right_en: Unexpected understanding, Pasha.

cards.text: 'Birbirimizi yıkmak yerine Sultan'ı birlikte yönetelim' diyor. Ama şartları ağır ve güveni yok.
cards.text_en: 'Rather than tearing each other down, let us govern the Sultan together,' he says. But his terms are heavy and he is untrustworthy.
cards.left_text_en: I do not trust him — I refuse
cards.speech_left_en: You have made a mistake — you will remember it.
cards.speech_right_en: Unexpected understanding, Pasha.

cards.text: Divan toplantısında Sultan'ın önünde sizi küçük düşüren bir konuşma yaptı. Herkes bekledi. Ne yapacaksınız?
cards.text_en: He made a speech before the Sultan in the Divan that humiliated you. Everyone waited. What will you do?
cards.speech_left_en: You have made a mistake — you will remember it.
cards.speech_right_en: Unexpected understanding, Pasha.

cards.text: Paşam, yarın idam edilecek mahkum hâlâ masum olduğunu haykırıyor. Ailesi kapıda, avukat tutamamış.
cards.text_en: Pasha, the condemned man who is to be executed tomorrow still cries out that he is innocent. His family is at the door; he had no lawyer.
cards.speech_left_en: Mercy? Rarely seen.
cards.speech_right_en: As you command, my lord.

cards.text: Efendim, son aylarda idam emirleri arttı. Tek başıma yetişemiyorum. İkinci bir cellat yardımcısı alabilir miyim?
cards.text_en: My lord, execution orders have increased in recent months. I cannot keep up alone. May I take on a second assistant?
cards.speech_left_en: Mercy? Rarely seen.
cards.speech_right_en: As you command, my lord.

cards.text: Mahkumun ailesi büyük bir rüşvet teklif etti. Kendi cebime koymam, ama af için size getirdim. Karar sizin.
cards.text_en: The condemned man's family offered a large bribe. I am not pocketing it — I brought it to you to decide about a pardon.
cards.speech_left_en: Mercy? Rarely seen.
cards.speech_right_en: As you command, my lord.

cards.text: Paşam, infaz listesinde on dört yaşında bir çocuk var. Suç — büyüklerin işine alet edilmiş. Elim gitmiyor.
cards.text_en: Pasha, there is a fourteen-year-old child on the execution list. The crime — he was used as a tool by adults. My hand trembles.
cards.left_text_en: The law is equal for all
cards.right_text_en: Pardon the minor and send him to exile
cards.speech_left_en: Mercy? Rarely seen.
cards.speech_right_en: As you command, my lord.

cards.text: Yakalanan yabancı casusun cezası belli değil. İdam mı, zindan mı, yoksa takas mı — karar sizden bekleniyor.
cards.text_en: The sentence for the captured foreign spy has not been determined. Execution, dungeon, or exchange — the decision awaits you.
cards.speech_left_en: Mercy? Rarely seen.
cards.speech_right_en: As you command, my lord.

cards.text: İstanbul'da humma vakalarının sayısı hızla artıyor, Paşam. Şehrin doğu mahallelerinde yayılıyor. Erken önlem şart.
cards.text_en: Cases of fever are multiplying rapidly in Istanbul, Pasha. They are spreading in the eastern districts. Early action is critical.
cards.left_text_en: Do not exaggerate — monitor the situation
cards.speech_left_en: Neglecting the body is costly.
cards.speech_right_en: A healthy state is a strong state.

cards.text: Doğudan gelen tüccar kafilesi şüpheli. Karantinaya almadan girmelerine izin vermeyin, derim.
cards.text_en: The merchant caravan arriving from the East is suspicious. I advise against letting them in without quarantine.
cards.left_text_en: Trade cannot stop — let them pass
cards.speech_left_en: Neglecting the body is costly.
cards.speech_right_en: A healthy state is a strong state.

cards.text: Üsküdar'da bir şifa evi (darüşşifa) kurulmasını öneriyorum. Yoksul hasta vatandaşlar için büyük hayır.
cards.text_en: I propose the establishment of a healing house (darüşşifa) in Üsküdar. A great blessing for poor and ailing citizens.
cards.speech_left_en: Neglecting the body is costly.
cards.speech_right_en: A healthy state is a strong state.

cards.text: Paşam, Sultan'ın sağlığıyla ilgili ciddi bir bilgiyi yalnızca size söylemem gerekiyor. Aylarca sürebilir. Hazır mısınız?
cards.investigate_text: Bu bilgi doğruysa ciddi bir veraset meselesi baş gösterebilir. Şehzadeler hazır mı?
cards.text_en: Pasha, there is a serious matter regarding the Sultan's health that I must tell only you. It could last months.
cards.left_text_en: Do not tell me — I do not wish to know
cards.investigate_text_en: If this information is accurate, a grave succession issue could arise. The princes are not yet prepared.
cards.speech_left_en: Neglecting the body is costly.
cards.speech_right_en: A healthy state is a strong state.

cards.text: Avrupa'dan getirtilen yeni bir şifa otu var. Denenmiş vakalar var ama yeterli kanıt henüz yok. Deneyeyim mi?
cards.text_en: A new herbal remedy has arrived from Europe. There are treated cases, but not yet sufficient proof. Should we experiment?
cards.right_text_en: Try it and report the results
cards.speech_left_en: Neglecting the body is costly.
cards.speech_right_en: A healthy state is a strong state.

cards.text: Rumeli'deki tımarlar yeniden dağıtılacak. İki aday var: biri Sultan'a yakın, biri en deneyimli sipahi. Kim hak ediyor?
cards.text_en: The timars in Rumelia will be redistributed. There are two candidates: one close to the Sultan, the other the most seasoned cavalry officer.
cards.left_text_en: Give it to the experienced officer
cards.right_text_en: Give it to the Sultan's man
cards.speech_left_en: The Sipahi have no patience, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your army is ready and eager.

cards.text: Sınır karakolları bekliyor ama erzak gönderilmedi. Süvariler açlıkla savaşmak zorunda kalacak.
cards.text_en: The border outposts are waiting but supplies were never sent. The cavalry will be forced to fight on empty stomachs.
cards.left_text_en: Let them wait one more week
cards.speech_left_en: The Sipahi have no patience, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your army is ready and eager.

cards.text: Otuz yıl hizmet vermiş yaşlı bir sipahi komutanı onurlu bir emeklilik talep ediyor. Tımarını da alıkoyabilir mi?
cards.text_en: A cavalry commander with thirty years of service is requesting an honorable retirement — and to keep his timar.
cards.left_text_en: The timar returns to the treasury
cards.speech_left_en: The Sipahi have no patience, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your army is ready and eager.

cards.text: Bir sipahi komutanının düşmandan para aldığına dair rapor var. Belki yalan, belki değil. Soruşturulsun mu?
cards.text_en: There is a report that a cavalry commander accepted money from the enemy. It may be false, but it may not. Should we investigate?
cards.left_text_en: There are no accusations without evidence
cards.speech_left_en: The Sipahi have no patience, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your army is ready and eager.

cards.text: Yeni sipahi taburunu bizzat denetlememi öneriyorsunuz. Ama denetim sırasında birkaç kişi disiplin cezası alacak.
cards.text_en: You are recommending that I personally inspect the new cavalry regiment. But during the inspection, a few men may face disciplinary punishment.
cards.speech_left_en: The Sipahi have no patience, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your army is ready and eager.

cards.text: Sizi öven yeni bir kaside yazdım, Paşam. Divan'da okunmasını istiyorum. Karşılığında mütevazı bir ihsan bekliyorum.
cards.text_en: I have written a new ode in your praise, Pasha. I wish it to be read in the Divan. In return, a modest gift would suffice.
cards.right_text_en: Let him recite it — and give the gift
cards.speech_left_en: Poetry too is a weapon, do not forget.
cards.speech_right_en: You have been a source of inspiration, Pasha.

cards.text: Rakibinizi hicveden bir şiir sarayda dolaşıyor. Kimin kalemi olduğu belli değil. Susturulsun mu?
cards.text_en: A satirical poem targeting your rival is circulating in the palace. Its author is unknown. Should it be silenced?
cards.right_text_en: Find its author and silence them
cards.speech_left_en: Poetry too is a weapon, do not forget.
cards.speech_right_en: You have been a source of inspiration, Pasha.

cards.text: Divan toplantısı için özel bir şiir bestelemek istiyorum. Konu ne olsun — zafer mi, adalet mi, hilal mi?
cards.text_en: I wish to compose a special poem for the Divan council. What should the theme be — victory, justice, or the crescent?
cards.speech_left_en: Poetry too is a weapon, do not forget.
cards.speech_right_en: You have been a source of inspiration, Pasha.

cards.text: Saray şiiri Arapça mı yoksa Farsça mı yazılmalı tartışması alevlendi. Şeyhülislam Arapça diyor, saray şairleri Farsça.
cards.text_en: The debate over whether court poetry should be written in Arabic or Persian has flared up. The Şeyhülislam says Arabic; the palace prefers Persian.
cards.speech_left_en: Poetry too is a weapon, do not forget.
cards.speech_right_en: You have been a source of inspiration, Pasha.

cards.text: Şairin ağzından garip bir dize çıktı: 'Tahtı tutan eller kendi zincirini dövecek.' Saray huzursuz. Susturulsun mu?
cards.text_en: A strange verse came from the poet's mouth: 'The hands that hold the throne will forge their own chains.' The palace is uneasy.
cards.left_text_en: The poet is mad — pay no attention
cards.speech_left_en: Poetry too is a weapon, do not forget.
cards.speech_right_en: You have been a source of inspiration, Pasha.

cards.text: İpek yolunun İstanbul geçişinde tekel hakkı istiyorum. Devlete yıllık sabit bir gelir garantisi verebilirim.
cards.text_en: I am requesting a monopoly right on the Istanbul passage of the Silk Road. In return, I guarantee the state a fixed annual income.
cards.speech_left_en: Trade stops, the state goes hungry.
cards.speech_right_en: Istanbul will prosper, Pasha.

cards.text: Mallarım gümrükte iki haftadır bekliyor. Görevliler rüşvet olmadan serbest bırakmıyor. Sizden çözüm istiyorum.
cards.text_en: My goods have been held at customs for two weeks. The officials will not release them without a bribe. I need a solution from you.
cards.speech_left_en: Trade stops, the state goes hungry.
cards.speech_right_en: Istanbul will prosper, Pasha.

cards.text: Kapadokya yolunda kervanım saldırıya uğradı. On adam öldü, mallar çalındı. Devlet tazminatı talep ediyorum.
cards.text_en: My caravan was attacked on the Cappadocian road. Ten men were killed, the goods stolen. I am requesting state compensation.
cards.speech_left_en: Trade stops, the state goes hungry.
cards.speech_right_en: Istanbul will prosper, Pasha.

cards.text: Portekizliler Hint yolunu kesiyor, baharat fiyatları fırladı. Osmanlı'nın kendi deniz yolu ticaret filosunu kurmasını öneriyorum.
cards.text_en: The Portuguese are cutting off the Indian route and spice prices have skyrocketed. Shall we consider an Ottoman maritime trade company?
cards.speech_left_en: Trade stops, the state goes hungry.
cards.speech_right_en: Istanbul will prosper, Pasha.

cards.text: Rakibim gümrük dışı mal kaçırıyor. Bizzat gördüm, tanığım var. Şikâyetimi kayıt altına almanızı istiyorum.
cards.text_en: My competitor is smuggling goods outside customs. I witnessed it myself and have a witness. I am requesting that my complaint be recorded.
cards.speech_left_en: Trade stops, the state goes hungry.
cards.speech_right_en: Istanbul will prosper, Pasha.

cards.text: Saraydan biri devlet sırrını dışarıya sızdırıyor. Ağımı genişletip kaynağı bulabilirim. İzin verir misiniz?
cards.text_en: Someone in the palace is leaking state secrets. If I expand my network, I can find the source. Do I have permission?
cards.speech_left_en: Shadows speak in silence.
cards.speech_right_en: The right decision — knowledge is power.

cards.text: Bir yabancı casusu yakaladım. İtiraf ettirmek için biraz zamana ihtiyacım var. Ne yapayım?
cards.text_en: I have caught a foreign spy. I need a little time to extract a confession. What shall I do?
cards.left_text_en: The dungeon is enough — no harsh methods
cards.speech_left_en: Shadows speak in silence.
cards.speech_right_en: The right decision — knowledge is power.

cards.text: Rakip vezirinizin özel yazışmalarına eriştim. Okumak ister misiniz? Bir kez açılırsa geri yolu yok.
cards.investigate_text: Casuslar Başı'nın kendisi de bu yazışmalardan yararlanmış olabilir. Size getirmesi tesadüf değil.
cards.text_en: I have gained access to your rival vizier's private correspondence. Would you like to read it? Once opened, there is no going back.
cards.investigate_text_en: The Head of Spies may have already benefited from this correspondence himself. Consider why he is bringing it to you now.
cards.speech_left_en: Shadows speak in silence.
cards.speech_right_en: The right decision — knowledge is power.

cards.text: Viyana sarayına bir ajan yerleştirmek istiyorum. Uzun vadeli yatırım — yıllarca sonuç vermeyebilir.
cards.text_en: I want to place an agent in the Vienna court. A long-term investment — it may not bear fruit for years.
cards.speech_left_en: Shadows speak in silence.
cards.speech_right_en: The right decision — knowledge is power.

cards.text: Ağımdaki en değerli ajanın çifte çalıştığını öğrendim. Onu nasıl kullanalım — midezenformasyon mu, tasfiye mi?
cards.text_en: I learned that my most valuable agent is working for both sides. How shall we use him — misinformation, or a trap?
cards.speech_left_en: Shadows speak in silence.
cards.speech_right_en: The right decision — knowledge is power.

cards.text: Paşam, köylüler ağır vergi altında eziliyor. Bazı köyler boşalmaya başladı. Bir şey yapmazsanız isyan kaçınılmaz.
cards.text_en: Pasha, the villagers are crushed under heavy taxes. Some villages have begun to empty. If nothing is done, rebellion is coming.
cards.left_text_en: Tell the people to be patient
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: İstanbul'da ekmek fiyatları son bir ayda iki katına çıktı. Fırıncılar vurgunculukla suçlanıyor. Ne yapacağız?
cards.text_en: In Istanbul, bread prices have doubled in the past month. Bakers are accused of profiteering. What is to be done?
cards.right_text_en: Set a price ceiling for bakers
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Orta Anadolu'da üç köy kıtlıkla karşı karşıya. Devlet zahire ambarlarını açmazsa insanlar açlıktan ölecek.
cards.text_en: Three villages in Central Anatolia are facing famine. If the state does not open its grain stores, people will starve.
cards.left_text_en: The stores are a strategic reserve
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Esnaf loncaları bu yıl vergi muafiyeti talep ediyor. Ticaret yavaşladı, kazançlar azaldı diyorlar.
cards.text_en: The artisan guilds are requesting a tax exemption this year. Trade has slowed, profits have fallen, they say.
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Taşradan gelen kalabalık sarayın önünde toplanıyor. Temsil ettiğim gruplar içlerinde var. Onlara ne diyeyim?
cards.text_en: A crowd from the provinces has gathered in front of the palace. Groups I represent are among them. What message do you send them?
cards.left_text_en: They must leave the palace grounds
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Harem kapılarında yetkisiz biri yakalandı. Kim olduğu henüz belli değil. Sizi haberdar etmek istedim.
cards.text_en: An unauthorized person was caught at the Harem gates. Their identity is not yet known. I wanted to inform you.
cards.left_text_en: Release them — keep them under watch
cards.speech_left_en: The palace lives on gossip.
cards.speech_right_en: You have protected the palace, Pasha.

cards.text: Avrupalı elçi saray protokolüne aykırı davrandı — önce eğilmeden konuştu. Diplomatik sorun mu çıkaralım?
cards.text_en: The European ambassador violated palace protocol — he spoke before bowing. Shall we let it create a diplomatic incident?
cards.left_text_en: Let it pass — it is trivial
cards.speech_left_en: The palace lives on gossip.
cards.speech_right_en: You have protected the palace, Pasha.

cards.text: Bir saray hizmetkârı çok özel bilgileri dışarıya sızdırmış. Kim olduğu belli, ama çok genç.
cards.text_en: A palace servant has leaked very confidential information to the outside. We know who it is, but he is very young.
cards.left_text_en: Pardon him and remove him from service
cards.speech_left_en: The palace lives on gossip.
cards.speech_right_en: You have protected the palace, Pasha.

cards.text: Sarayın iç hizmetlerine yeni personel alacağız. İki grup var: Devşirme yolu mu, özgür Müslüman aile mi?
cards.text_en: We will be taking on new staff for palace interior services. Two options: the devşirme system, or from free Muslim families. Which?
cards.speech_left_en: The palace lives on gossip.
cards.speech_right_en: You have protected the palace, Pasha.

cards.text: Sultan'la özel görüşme talep eden bir kişi ısrar ediyor. Tanımıyorum, ama şüpheli görünmüyor. Ne yapayım?
cards.text_en: A person is insisting on a private audience with the Sultan. I do not know them, but they do not appear suspicious. What shall I do?
cards.right_text_en: I will meet them — not the Sultan
cards.speech_left_en: The palace lives on gossip.
cards.speech_right_en: You have protected the palace, Pasha.

cards.text: Paşam, Anadolu'nun doğusundan kara haberler geliyor. Veba belirtileri. Henüz uzakta ama yaklaşıyor.
cards.text_en: Pasha, dark reports are coming from the east of Anatolia. Signs of plague. Still distant, but approaching.
cards.speech_left_en: Stopping the plague will be difficult.
cards.speech_right_en: Precautions taken — God protect us.

cards.text: Etkilenen köylerin tamamen boşaltılmasını öneriyorum. Ama köylüler gitmek istemiyor, zorla mı çıkaralım?
cards.text_en: I am recommending complete evacuation of the affected villages. But the villagers do not want to leave — shall we compel them?
cards.speech_left_en: Stopping the plague will be difficult.
cards.speech_right_en: Precautions taken — God protect us.

cards.text: İstanbul'un kapılarını kapatmayı öneriyorum. Ticaret durur ama salgın engellenir. Karar zor.
cards.text_en: I propose closing Istanbul's gates. Trade will halt, but the epidemic will be contained. A difficult decision.
cards.speech_left_en: Stopping the plague will be difficult.
cards.speech_right_en: Precautions taken — God protect us.

cards.text: Veba kurbanlarının sahipsiz mülkleri için acil karar gerekiyor. Devlete mi devredilsin, mirasçılara mı kalsın?
cards.text_en: An urgent decision is needed for the ownerless properties of plague victims. Transfer to the state, or to their heirs?
cards.speech_left_en: Stopping the plague will be difficult.
cards.speech_right_en: Precautions taken — God protect us.

cards.text: Sağ kurtulan köylerin imam ve hekime ihtiyacı var. Gönüllü bulamıyoruz. Devlet mi görevlendirir?
cards.text_en: The surviving villages need an imam and a physician. We cannot find volunteers. Should the state assign personnel?
cards.right_text_en: The state will send assigned officials
cards.speech_left_en: Stopping the plague will be difficult.
cards.speech_right_en: Precautions taken — God protect us.

cards.text: Paşam, yeniçerilerden bir grup kazan kaldırdı. Şimdilik küçük ama büyüyebilir. Müzakere mi, kuvvet mi?
cards.text_en: Pasha, a group of Janissaries has raised the cauldron. Small for now, but it can grow. Negotiation or force?
cards.speech_left_en: Once the cauldron is raised, there is no return.
cards.speech_right_en: The rebellion is quelled — for now.

cards.text: İsyancıların lideri gizlice mesaj yolladı. 'Beş talebimiz var, karşılanırsa geri döneriz.' Dinlensin mi?
cards.text_en: The rebel leader sent a secret message: 'We have five demands; if they are met, we will stand down.' Should they be heard?
cards.speech_left_en: Once the cauldron is raised, there is no return.
cards.speech_right_en: The rebellion is quelled — for now.

cards.text: İsyan bastırıldı ama lider kaçtı. Affedilip geri çağrılsın mı, yoksa aransın mı?
cards.text_en: The revolt has been suppressed but the leader escaped. Should he be pardoned and recalled, or hunted down?
cards.speech_left_en: Once the cauldron is raised, there is no return.
cards.speech_right_en: The rebellion is quelled — for now.

cards.text: Yeniçerilerden bir bölük Sultan'ın camından geçit talep ediyor. Gösteri mi, saygı mı — niyetleri belirsiz.
cards.text_en: A company of Janissaries is requesting a procession through the Sultan's mosque. Demonstration or reverence — their intentions are unclear.
cards.speech_left_en: Once the cauldron is raised, there is no return.
cards.speech_right_en: The rebellion is quelled — for now.

cards.text: İsyancı bir er tövbeli olarak geri dönmek istiyor. Sadık birliklere katılmasına izin verilsin mi?
cards.text_en: A repentant rebel wants to return. Should he be allowed to join the loyal troops?
cards.right_text_en: Accept him and keep him under observation
cards.speech_left_en: Once the cauldron is raised, there is no return.
cards.speech_right_en: The rebellion is quelled — for now.

cards.text: Paşam, babamdan kalma tarlamıza el konuldu. Bir ağanın adamları sınır taşını kaydırdı. Adaleti sizden bekliyorum.
cards.text_en: Pasha, our field — which was my father's — has been seized. A lord's men moved the boundary stone. I am seeking justice from you.
cards.speech_left_en: The peasant cries — no one hears.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has not forgotten us — thanks be.

cards.text: Köyümüzün yakınında eşkıyalar kol geziyor. Üç haftadır mahsulümüzü yağmalıyorlar. Yardım gelmeli.
cards.text_en: Bandits are roaming near our village. They have been pillaging our harvest for three weeks. Help must come.
cards.left_text_en: Let the local lord handle it
cards.speech_left_en: The peasant cries — no one hears.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has not forgotten us — thanks be.

cards.text: Bu yıl hasat berbat gitti. Vergiyi ödeyemiyoruz, evlerimizi mi satalım? Bir yıl erteleme yeter.
cards.text_en: This year's harvest was terrible. We cannot pay the tax — must we sell our homes? One year's deferral would suffice.
cards.left_text_en: The rule is equal for all
cards.speech_left_en: The peasant cries — no one hears.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has not forgotten us — thanks be.

cards.text: Köyümüzde su kanalı açılırsa kuraklık sorununu hallederiz. Onlarca köy faydalanır. Ufak bir yatırım.
cards.text_en: If a water canal is dug through our village, the drought problem will be solved. Dozens of villages would benefit. A modest investment.
cards.speech_left_en: The peasant cries — no one hears.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has not forgotten us — thanks be.

cards.text: Toprağı terk edip İstanbul'a yerleşmek istiyorum. Ailecek kararımız verdik. Şehirde iş var mı?
cards.text_en: I want to leave the land and settle in Istanbul. We have decided as a family. Is there work in the city?
cards.left_text_en: It is better for you to stay in the village
cards.right_text_en: Istanbul's doors are open to all
cards.speech_left_en: The peasant cries — no one hears.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has not forgotten us — thanks be.

cards.text: Fener'deki Patrikane binası yıllar içinde harap oldu. Onarım için izin ve küçük bir destek talep ediyorum.
cards.text_en: The Patriarchate building in Fener has fallen into disrepair over the years. I am requesting permission and a small amount of support.
cards.speech_left_en: Our church is under pressure, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your tolerance will go down in history.

cards.text: Rum cemaati Müslüman komşularına göre iki kat vergi ödüyor. Bu eşitsizlik toplum barışını bozuyor.
cards.text_en: The Rum community pays twice the tax of their Muslim neighbors. This inequality is damaging community harmony.
cards.left_text_en: This is how the millet system works
cards.speech_left_en: Our church is under pressure, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your tolerance will go down in history.

cards.text: Bir vali cemaatimize yönelik İslam'a geçme baskısı uyguluyor. Resmen şikâyet ediyorum. Ne yapacaksınız?
cards.text_en: A governor is applying pressure on our community to convert to Islam. I am formally complaining. What will you do?
cards.left_text_en: The governor is free in his own province
cards.right_text_en: Issue a warning to the governor
cards.speech_left_en: Our church is under pressure, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your tolerance will go down in history.

cards.text: Yaşlılığım gerekçesiyle yeni bir Patrik seçmek istiyorum. Ama Osmanlı onayı şart. İki aday var, birini destekleyecek misiniz?
cards.text_en: On grounds of old age, I wish to elect a new Patriarch. Ottoman approval is required. There are two candidates — one closer to the Ottomans.
cards.right_text_en: Approve the one closer to the Ottomans
cards.speech_left_en: Our church is under pressure, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your tolerance will go down in history.

cards.text: Rum okullarında Türkçe zorunlu eğitim kararına itiraz ediyorum. Kendi dilimizde öğretim hakkımız var.
cards.text_en: I object to the compulsory Turkish education decision for Rum schools. We have the right to teach in our own language.
cards.left_text_en: The decision belongs to the state — comply
cards.speech_left_en: Our church is under pressure, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your tolerance will go down in history.

cards.text: Kuyumcu loncasına üye olmak istiyorum ama 'Hristiyan kabul edilmez' diyorlar. Devlet arabuluculuğu talep ediyorum.
cards.text_en: I want to join the goldsmiths' guild but they say 'Christians are not accepted.' I am requesting state mediation.
cards.left_text_en: The guild knows its own rules
cards.speech_left_en: If the trade route closes, we all suffer.
cards.speech_right_en: Our service to Istanbul continues.

cards.text: Doğu'daki ticaret ağım sayesinde Safevi sarayından önemli bir bilgiye ulaştım. Karşılıklı çıkar esasında paylaşabilirim.
cards.text_en: Through my trade network in the East, I have access to important intelligence from the Safavid court. Mutual interest is the basis.
cards.left_text_en: Thank you, but we do not buy paid information
cards.speech_left_en: If the trade route closes, we all suffer.
cards.speech_right_en: Our service to Istanbul continues.

cards.text: Haksız bir değerlendirme sonucu büyük vergi cezası yedim. İtiraz hakkım yok muydu? Af talep ediyorum.
cards.text_en: I received a large tax penalty following an unfair assessment. Did I not have the right to appeal? I am requesting a pardon.
cards.left_text_en: The rule is equal for all
cards.speech_left_en: If the trade route closes, we all suffer.
cards.speech_right_en: Our service to Istanbul continues.

cards.text: Cemaat olarak kilise onarımı için bağış toplamak istiyoruz. Devletin onayını alıp açıkça yapabilir miyiz?
cards.text_en: As a community, we want to collect donations for church repairs. May we do so openly, with official approval?
cards.speech_left_en: If the trade route closes, we all suffer.
cards.speech_right_en: Our service to Istanbul continues.

cards.text: Bir Yahudi tüccarla senet anlaşmazlığına düştüm. Her ikimiz de haklı olduğunu savunuyor. Divan'da çözüm istiyorum.
cards.text_en: I have a promissory note dispute with a Jewish merchant. Both of us maintain we are right. Can it be resolved in the Divan?
cards.speech_left_en: If the trade route closes, we all suffer.
cards.speech_right_en: Our service to Istanbul continues.

cards.text: Paşam, hazine sıkışırsa benden borç alabilirsiniz. Faiz küçük, vade uzun. Ailem Osmanlı'ya sadık.
cards.text_en: Pasha, if the treasury tightens, you may borrow from me. Low interest, long term. My family has been loyal to the Ottomans.
cards.speech_left_en: Fear demands a higher interest than money.
cards.speech_right_en: Your treasury will grow, Pasha.

cards.text: İstanbul Yahudi cemaatinin bazı hakları sessizce kısıtlandı. Resmî bir güvence belgesi talep ediyoruz.
cards.text_en: Some rights of the Istanbul Jewish community have quietly been restricted. I am requesting an official letter of guarantee.
cards.speech_left_en: Fear demands a higher interest than money.
cards.speech_right_en: Your treasury will grow, Pasha.

cards.text: Bir Osmanlı paşasının hesaplarında büyük açık var. Bu bilgiyi size getirdim. Devlet çıkarını korumalıyım dedim.
cards.investigate_text: Bankacının bu bilgiyi neden getirdiğini düşünmek lazım. Belki söz konusu paşa onun rakibi.
cards.text_en: There is a large discrepancy in an Ottoman pasha's accounts. I brought this to you. The state's interests must be protected.
cards.left_text_en: Thank you for bringing this information
cards.investigate_text_en: It is worth considering why the banker brought this information. Perhaps the pasha in question owes him a significant debt.
cards.speech_left_en: Fear demands a higher interest than money.
cards.speech_right_en: Your treasury will grow, Pasha.

cards.text: Avrupa'daki akraba ağım önemli bir gelişme raporladı: Habsburglar doğuda büyük bir ittifak hazırlıyor.
cards.text_en: My kinship network in Europe has reported an important development: the Habsburgs are preparing a major eastern alliance.
cards.right_text_en: Report it to the Head of Spies
cards.speech_left_en: Fear demands a higher interest than money.
cards.speech_right_en: Your treasury will grow, Pasha.

cards.text: Servetime el konulabileceğine dair söylentiler var. Güvence istemek için geldim. Ne söylersiniz?
cards.text_en: There are rumors that my wealth could be confiscated. I came to request assurance. What do you say?
cards.left_text_en: The rumors are empty — do not fear
cards.speech_left_en: Fear demands a higher interest than money.
cards.speech_right_en: Your treasury will grow, Pasha.

cards.text: Şah adına sınır anlaşmazlığında arabuluculuk teklif ediyorum. Kan dökülmeden çözüm mümkün.
cards.text_en: On behalf of the Shah, I am offering mediation in the border dispute. A resolution without bloodshed is possible.
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: Anadolu'daki Alevi topluluklar için güvence talep ediyoruz. Şah onların koruyucusu olarak bizi görevlendirdi.
cards.text_en: We are requesting guarantees for the Alevi communities in Anatolia. The Shah sees himself as their protector.
cards.left_text_en: Do not interfere in our internal affairs
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: Şah gizli bir ateşkes öneriyor. Sultan bilmeyecek, yalnızca siz. Sınırda kanlı çatışmalar durur.
cards.investigate_text: Bu teklifin Sultan'dan önce size gelmesi tesadüf değil. Şah sizi Sultan'dan bağımsız bir güç olarak test ediyor.
cards.text_en: The Shah proposes a secret ceasefire. The Sultan will not know — only you. The bloody clashes on the border would stop.
cards.left_text_en: I make no agreements without the Sultan
cards.investigate_text_en: It is not coincidence that this proposal comes to you before the Sultan. The Shah wants to separate you from him.
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: İki ülkedeki esirlerin takas edilmesini öneriyorum. Eşit sayılar, tören olmadan, sessizce.
cards.text_en: I propose exchanging prisoners from both countries. Equal numbers, without ceremony, quietly.
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: Elçinin çantasında şifreli bir mektup bulundu. Elçi itiraz ediyor. Diplomatik kriz mi, soruşturma mı?
cards.text_en: An encrypted letter was found in the ambassador's bag. The ambassador objects. Diplomatic crisis, or investigation?
cards.left_text_en: Do not touch it — send the ambassador back
cards.right_text_en: Open the letter and examine it
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: Osmanlı hizmetine girmek istiyorum, Paşam. Filosum hazır, adamlarım sadık. Yıllık bağlılık karşılığında.
cards.text_en: I wish to enter Ottoman service, Pasha. My fleet is ready, my men are loyal. In exchange for annual patronage.
cards.speech_left_en: On the sea, I set the rules.
cards.speech_right_en: The Ottoman banner waves on.

cards.text: Ele geçirdiğim düşman gemisinin ganimetinden payımı istiyorum. Anlaşmamız böyleydi değil mi?
cards.text_en: I am requesting my share of the spoils from the enemy vessel I captured. That was our agreement, was it not?
cards.left_text_en: No share — that was the job
cards.speech_left_en: On the sea, I set the rules.
cards.speech_right_en: The Ottoman banner waves on.

cards.text: Korsanım bir tüccar gemisini vurdu. Tüccar şikâyetçi. Ama o gemi aslında düşmana mal taşıyormuş.
cards.text_en: My corsair struck a merchant vessel. The merchant is complaining. But that ship was apparently carrying goods for the enemy.
cards.speech_left_en: On the sea, I set the rules.
cards.speech_right_en: The Ottoman banner waves on.

cards.text: Kuzey Afrika kıyısında üs kurmak istiyorum. Osmanlı bayrağı altında. Akdeniz'in batısını kontrol ederiz.
cards.text_en: I want to establish a base on the North African coast — under the Ottoman flag. I can control the western Mediterranean.
cards.speech_left_en: On the sea, I set the rules.
cards.speech_right_en: The Ottoman banner waves on.

cards.text: Önemli bir Avrupalı soylunun kaptığım esirim var. Fidyeyi bizzat mi toplarım, yoksa devlete mi teslim ederim?
cards.text_en: I have a captured important European nobleman as my prisoner. Shall I collect the ransom myself, or hand him over to the state?
cards.left_text_en: Hand him over to the state
cards.speech_left_en: On the sea, I set the rules.
cards.speech_right_en: The Ottoman banner waves on.

cards.text: Camilerin önünde bağırıyor: 'Kırk gün sonra İstanbul yıkılacak!' Kalabalık büyüyor. Endişe verici.
cards.text_en: He is shouting outside the mosques: 'Istanbul will fall in forty days!' The crowd is growing. Concerning.
cards.speech_left_en: The wind can turn — be careful.
cards.speech_right_en: If the heart is pure, the way opens.

cards.text: Kapınıza gizemli bir mektup bırakmış. İçinde yalnızca üç cümle var: 'Güvenmediğiniz birini güveniyorsunuz. Güvendiğiniz birini gönderdiniz. Saat dolmadan bakın.'
cards.text_en: He left a mysterious letter at your door. Inside are only three sentences: 'You trust someone you shouldn't...'
cards.right_text_en: Send it to the Head of Spies
cards.speech_left_en: The wind can turn — be careful.
cards.speech_right_en: If the heart is pure, the way opens.

cards.text: Derviş çevresinde toplanan halk yönetilemez hale geliyor. Lonca temsilcileri endişeli, Şeyhülislam da.
cards.text_en: The crowd gathering around the dervish is becoming unmanageable. Guild representatives are uneasy; the Şeyhülislam is troubled.
cards.speech_left_en: The wind can turn — be careful.
cards.speech_right_en: If the heart is pure, the way opens.

cards.text: Şeyhülislam dervişi zındıklıkla suçladı. Ama halk onu veli biliyor. Suçlamayı onaylayacak mısınız?
cards.text_en: The Şeyhülislam has charged the dervish with heresy. But the people consider him a saint. Will you approve the accusation?
cards.speech_left_en: The wind can turn — be careful.
cards.speech_right_en: If the heart is pure, the way opens.

cards.text: Derviş sizi huzuruna çekti: 'Yakında büyük bir ihanet olacak. Kim olduğunu biliyorum ama söylemeyeceğim — kendiniz bulacaksınız.'
cards.text_en: The dervish drew you close: 'A great betrayal is coming soon. I know who it is, but I will not say — you must find it yourself.'
cards.left_text_en: I do not let myself be misled by a madman's words
cards.speech_left_en: The wind can turn — be careful.
cards.speech_right_en: If the heart is pure, the way opens.

cards.text: Bir eyaletin yönetimini üstlenmek istiyorum, Paşam. Hazır olduğumu düşünüyorum. Sizin de desteğinizi istiyorum.
cards.text_en: I wish to take on the administration of a province, Pasha. I believe I am ready. I need your support.
cards.speech_left_en: Youth is impatient — I know.
cards.speech_right_en: I would give my life for the state.

cards.text: İlk büyük siyasî hatasını yaptı. Yanlış bir müttefike söz vermiş. Nasıl ele alacaksınız?
cards.text_en: He made his first great political mistake — he gave his word to the wrong ally. How will you handle it?
cards.left_text_en: Let him solve it himself — he must learn
cards.speech_left_en: Youth is impatient — I know.
cards.speech_right_en: I would give my life for the state.

cards.text: Sizden düzenli akıl hocalığı istiyor. Haftada birkaç saat alır ama güçlü bir müttefik yetiştirir.
cards.text_en: He is requesting regular mentorship from you. A few hours a week, but it could nurture a powerful ally.
cards.speech_left_en: Youth is impatient — I know.
cards.speech_right_en: I would give my life for the state.

cards.text: Rakip bir vezirin genç adamlarıyla kavgaya girdi. Küçük bir sarhoş kavgası ama büyüyebilir.
cards.text_en: He got into a brawl with the young men of a rival vizier. A minor drunken scuffle, but it could escalate.
cards.left_text_en: His own problem — do not interfere
cards.right_text_en: They used you as a pawn — warn him
cards.speech_left_en: Youth is impatient — I know.
cards.speech_right_en: I would give my life for the state.

cards.text: Sizi atlayarak doğrudan Sultan'a gitti. Bir teklifi var ve onay aldı. Sizden haberdar etmesini beklediniz ama gelmedi.
cards.text_en: He bypassed you and went directly to the Sultan. He had a proposal — and got approval. You expected to be informed first.
cards.speech_left_en: Youth is impatient — I know.
cards.speech_right_en: I would give my life for the state.

cards.text: Sadrazam, batıda bir prenslik bize meydan okuyor. Kılıç mı çekelim, yoksa müzakere mi açalım?
cards.text_en: Grand Vizier, a principality in the west continues to defy us. Shall we draw the sword, or open negotiations?
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Paşam, düşman sarayında bir fırsat doğdu. Gizli bir operasyon başlatabilir, büyük bilgiler elde edebiliriz. Risk yüksek.
cards.investigate_text: Casuslar Başı bu operasyon için üç aydır hazırlık yapmış. Ama hedef saray değil — belgeler size çok yakın birini işaret ediyor. Kim olduğunu bilmeden karar vermek tehlikeli.
cards.text_en: Pasha, an opportunity has emerged in the enemy's court. I can launch a covert operation and obtain vital intelligence.
cards.investigate_text_en: The Head of Spies has been preparing for this operation for three months — but the real target may not be the enemy court.
cards.speech_left_en: Shadows speak in silence.
cards.speech_right_en: The right decision — knowledge is power.

cards.text: İttifak görüşmeleri başladı, Paşam. Venedik, Akdeniz'deki ticaret yollarını paylaşmak istiyor.
cards.text_en: The alliance talks have begun, Pasha. Venice wants to share the trade routes across the Mediterranean.
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Elçi tekrar geldi. Bu kez ortak bir donanma operasyonu teklif ediyorlar. Hem kazanç hem risk var.
cards.text_en: The ambassador returned. This time they are proposing a joint naval operation. Both gain and risk are involved.
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Venedik ittifakının son halkası: kalıcı bir büyükelçilik. Kabul ederseniz her yıl hediyeler geliyor.
cards.text_en: The final link in the Venetian alliance: a permanent embassy. If accepted, gifts arrive every year.
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Doğu cephesinde hareketlilik var, Paşam. Safevi kuvvetleri sınıra yaklaşıyor. Önlem almalıyız.
cards.text_en: There is activity on the eastern front, Pasha. Safavid forces are approaching the border. We must act.
cards.left_text_en: Fall back to a defensive position
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: Karakol kuruldu ama erzak azalıyor. Ek kuvvet ve ikmal istiyoruz, Paşam.
cards.text_en: The outpost has been established but supplies are dwindling. We need reinforcements and resupply, Pasha.
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: Doğu seferi sona erdi. Toprak kazandık ve Safevi tehdidini uzaklaştırdık. İstanbul'a zafer haberi gönderilsin mi?
cards.text_en: The eastern campaign is over. We gained territory and pushed back the Safavid threat. Shall we send a victory dispatch to Istanbul?
cards.speech_left_en: The Shah will not forgive this, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Peace benefits both sides.

cards.text: Paşam, ticaret antlaşması için üç farklı teklif getirdim. Hangisini kabul edersiniz?

negotiation_options.label: Düşük Teklif — Az kazanç, az risk
Yüksek Teklif — Büyük kazanç, yüksek risk

cards.text_en: Pasha, I have brought three different proposals for the trade agreement. Which will you accept?
cards.speech_left_en: This refusal means war, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: My homeland thanks you.

cards.text: Paşam, vergi sistemini yeniden düzenlemeliyiz. Hangi grubu öncelikli tutacaksınız?

negotiation_options.label: Tüccarları Koru — Hazine hafif düşer, ticaret canlanır
Köylüyü Koru — Ulema memnun, hazine acı çeker
Herkes Versin — Hazine dolar, halk kızar

cards.text_en: Pasha, we must reorganize the tax system. Which group will you prioritize?
cards.speech_left_en: You will regret this, my lord.
cards.speech_right_en: The state has found safety.

cards.text: YIL BAŞI OLAYI: Şehirde veba salgını baş gösterdi! Halk panikle koşuşturuyor.
cards.text_en: YEAR EVENT: A plague epidemic has broken out in the city! The people are panicking.
cards.speech_left_en: Stopping the plague will be difficult.
cards.speech_right_en: Precautions taken — God protect us.

cards.text: YIL BAŞI OLAYI: Büyük kuraklık! Mahsuller yandı, halk aç.
cards.text_en: YEAR EVENT: Great drought! The harvest is burnt, the people starve.
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: YIL BAŞI OLAYI: Büyük yangın! Çarşı mahallesi yanıyor.
cards.text_en: YEAR EVENT: A great fire! The bazaar district is burning.
cards.speech_left_en: The palace lives on gossip.
cards.speech_right_en: You have protected the palace, Pasha.

cards.text: YIL BAŞI OLAYI: Bu yıl bol hasat! Ambarlar dolu, halk mutlu.
cards.text_en: YEAR EVENT: An abundant harvest this year! The stores are full, the people are happy.
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: YIL BAŞI OLAYI: Sınırda düşman kuvvetleri toplandığı haberi geldi!
cards.text_en: YEAR EVENT: News has arrived that enemy forces are massing at the border!
cards.speech_left_en: The Sipahi have no patience, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your army is ready and eager.

cards.text: Paşam, dini çevreler orduyu sürekli engelliyor. Yeniçeriler artık fetva beklemeden hareket etmek istiyor. Ya orduyu desteklersiniz ya da...
cards.text_en: Pasha, the clergy keep obstructing the army. The Janissaries now want to move without waiting for a fatwa.
cards.speech_left_en: The Sipahi have no patience, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Your army is ready and eager.

cards.text: Paşam, ordu ileri gidiyor. Savaş gelirleri halkı mahvediyor. Ulema olarak size uyarıyoruz: Ya dinleyin ya da halkı biz yönlendiririz.
cards.text_en: Pasha, the army is overreaching. War revenues are ruining the people. As the clergy, we warn you: either listen, or...
cards.speech_left_en: This is not the path of God, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: So sharia commands — rightly done.

cards.text: Valide Sultan sert konuşuyor: Paşam, halkı dinlemeyi bırakın. Saray mı yönetiyor bu ülkeyi yoksa sokaklardaki halk mı?
cards.speech_right: Bilge bir karar, Allah razı olsun.
cards.text_en: The Valide Sultan speaks harshly: Pasha, stop listening to the people. Who governs this country — the palace or the street?
cards.speech_left_en: You should listen to your mother, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may God be pleased.

cards.text: İstanbul çarşılarında ayaklanma başlıyor. Saray kararları halkı boğuyor. Ya bizden yana geçin ya da sultan size olan güvenini yeniden düşünsün.
cards.text_en: An uprising is beginning in Istanbul's bazaars. Palace decisions are suffocating the people. Either stand with us or against us.
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience is running thin, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The people pray for you — may God be pleased.

cards.text: Paşam, yıllardır aramızda bir hain vardı. Nihayet maskeyi düşürdük. Sultan'a rapor hazırlandı. Ama iş çok karışık...
cards.text_en: Pasha, there has been a traitor among us for years. We have finally unmasked them. A report is being prepared for the Sultan. But it is your call.
cards.speech_left_en: Shadows speak in silence.
cards.speech_right_en: The right decision — knowledge is power.

cards.text:
🔏 Sultan'dan Mektup

Sadrazam,

Güneydeki eyaletlerden raporlar geldi. Vergi tahsilatı yüzde on düştü. Bu kabul edilemez. Hazineni topla. Sultanın gözü sende.

— Sultan Hatt-ı Hümayunu
cards.text_en:
🔏 Letter from the Sultan

Grand Vizier,

Reports have arrived from the southern provinces. Tax collection has fallen ten percent. The people are suffering. What have you done?
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text:
🔏 Sultan'dan Mektup

Sadrazam,

Yeniçerilerin son talepleri kulağıma ulaştı. Onlara verdiğin cevaptan memnun değilim. Ordu benim elimde olmalı, senin değil. Dikkatli ol.

— Sultan Hatt-ı Hümayunu
cards.text_en:
🔏 Letter from the Sultan

Grand Vizier,

The Janissaries' latest demands have reached my ears. Your response seemed too lenient. Command must be firm.
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text:
🔏 Sultan'dan Mektup

Sadrazam,

Bu yıl yaptıklarını takdirle karşılıyorum. İstanbul halkı huzurlu, hazine dengeli. Sadakatini unutmayacağım.

— Sultan Hatt-ı Hümayunu
cards.text_en:
🔏 Letter from the Sultan

Grand Vizier,

I commend what you have done this year. The people of Istanbul are at peace, the treasury has grown. Well done.
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text:
🔏 Sultan'dan Mektup

Sadrazam,

Doğu sınırından endişe verici haberler geliyor. Sefer kararını ertelememizi tavsiye eden danışmanlarım var. Senin görüşün nedir? Bir sonraki divanda bekliyorum.

— Sultan Hatt-ı Hümayunu
cards.text_en:
🔏 Letter from the Sultan

Grand Vizier,

Worrying news comes from the eastern border. Delay the campaign decision for now. We must remain cautious.
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Derviş önünüze altın bir sikke koydu. 'Baş gelirse zafer, yazı gelirse ders' dedi ve gitti.
cards.text_en: The dervish placed a golden coin before you. 'Heads means victory, tails means a lesson,' he said — and left.
cards.speech_left_en: Fate does not knock — it enters.
cards.speech_right_en: Fortune smiles — but sometimes it weeps.

cards.text: Rakibiniz bir bahis öneriyor: 'İki kişiden biri haklı — şans belirlesin.' Ret sayılmaz, ya katılırsınız ya kaçarsınız.
cards.text_en: Your rival proposes a wager: 'One of us is right — let chance decide.' Refusal is not allowed; either you play or you forfeit.
cards.speech_left_en: You have made a mistake — you will remember it.
cards.speech_right_en: Unexpected understanding, Pasha.

cards.text: Bankacı riskli bir yatırım öneriyor. 'Yarı ihtimalle iki katı, yarı ihtimalle hepsi gider.' Hazineyle oynamak ne kadar akıllıca?
cards.text_en: The banker proposes a risky investment. 'Fifty percent chance of doubling, fifty percent chance of losing everything.' With the treasury.
cards.speech_left_en: Fear demands a higher interest than money.
cards.speech_right_en: Your treasury will grow, Pasha.

cards.text: Deniz savaşı kaçınılmaz oldu. Karşı rüzgar ya da lehimize — Allah'a bıraktık.
cards.text_en: A sea battle became inevitable. The wind is against us or in our favor — we have left it to God.
cards.speech_left_en: The seas are unforgiving, Grand Vizier.
cards.speech_right_en: The fleet is ready, awaiting your orders.

cards.text: Sultan bir sürpriz sınav yapıyor. Sadrazamın şansı ne kadar yaver gider? 'Bugün kader gününüz' dedi.
cards.text_en: The Sultan is conducting a surprise test. How fortunate is the Grand Vizier? 'Today is your day of destiny,' he said.
cards.speech_left_en: Grand Vizier, this displeases me.
cards.speech_right_en: A wise decision — may it be blessed.

cards.text: Paşam, zafer haberleri geldi! Savaşa girme kararınız meyve verdi. Askerlerimiz başarılı, düşman geri çekildi. Ama kayıplarımız da var.
cards.text_en: Pasha, victory reports have arrived! Your decision to enter the war has borne fruit. Our soldiers have succeeded, the enemy is in retreat.
cards.speech_left_en: Wisdom is sometimes silence.
cards.speech_right_en: Victory announces itself!

cards.text: Paşam, barış kararınızın ardından karşı taraf müzakere masasına oturdu. Şartlar ağır değil, ama vazgeçilen şeyler var. Antlaşmayı imzalayalım mı?
cards.text_en: Pasha, following your peace decision, the other side has come to the negotiation table. The terms are not harsh — but concessions must be made.
cards.speech_left_en: Let us not be hasty, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Reason is sharper than the sword.

cards.text: Paşam, gizli operasyon başarıyla tamamlandı. Düşman sarayından kritik belgeler ele geçirdik. Bu bilgileri nasıl kullanacağız?
cards.text_en: Pasha, the covert operation was completed successfully. We obtained critical documents from the enemy court. How shall we use this intelligence?
cards.right_text_en: Use it as a diplomatic lever
cards.speech_left_en: Knowledge is the most powerful weapon.
cards.speech_right_en: We will use it when the time comes.

cards.text: Paşam, kışla teklifini reddetmenizin üzerinden aylar geçti. Askerler artık daha da huzursuz. Bu sefer talep değil, uyarı: ya kışla ya isyan.
cards.speech_right: Geç kalmış bir kararı ilk kabul saymayız.
cards.text_en: Pasha, months have passed since you rejected the barracks proposal. The soldiers are even more restless now. This time there are consequences.
cards.speech_left_en: Being refused is considered an insult, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: A late decision does not count as the first.

cards.text: Maaşlar geciktiğinden beri ocak içinde konuşmalar değişti. Bir grup kazan kaldırmayı konuşuyor. Haber aldım, size bildirdim.
cards.text_en: Since the wage delay, conversations inside the barracks have changed. A group is talking about raising the cauldron. Here is the intelligence.
cards.speech_left_en: The sound of money is louder than a war cry.
cards.speech_right_en: These words saved a life, Pasha.

cards.text: Önlemlerimiz işe yaradı, Paşam. Veba yayılmayı durdurdu. Ama tedaviyi sürdürmek için devlet desteğine ihtiyacımız var.
cards.text_en: Our measures worked, Pasha. The plague has stopped spreading. But continuing treatment requires state support.
cards.left_text_en: That is enough — leave it to run its course
cards.speech_left_en: The state cannot cover everything.
cards.speech_right_en: Without health, there is no state.

cards.text: İsyan bastırıldıktan sonra saray içinde rahatladı. Ama nedenlere bakılmadan sadece gücü gösterdiniz — bu uzun vadede tekrar patlak verir.
cards.text_en: After the rebellion was suppressed, the palace relaxed. But you showed force without examining the causes.
cards.speech_left_en: Fear is the shortest path, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Reason comes before force.

cards.text: Venedik ittifakının ardından ticaret yolları açıldı, Paşam. İstanbul limanı şenlendi. Vergi gelirlerimiz arttı.
cards.text_en: Following the Venetian alliance, the trade routes have opened, Pasha. Istanbul's harbor is thriving. Tax revenues are up.
cards.speech_left_en: Balance is the greatest achievement.
cards.speech_right_en: Opportunities pass when you wait, Pasha.

cards.text: Üsküdar medresesinden ilk mezunlar çıktı. Genç ulema artık her mahallede. Onlara devlet görevi verilsin mi, yoksa serbest mi bıraksın?
cards.text_en: The first graduates from the Üsküdar madrasa have emerged. Young clergy are now present in every neighborhood. Should they be given state positions?
cards.speech_left_en: Learning knows no barriers, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: State and faith grow from the same tree.

cards.text: Zafer sonrası ele geçirilen ganimetlerin paylaşımı bekleniyor. Askerler hak ettiklerini istiyor. Nasıl taksim edeceğiz?
cards.text_en: The distribution of spoils captured after victory is anticipated. The soldiers want what they believe they deserve. How shall it be handled?
cards.speech_left_en: The treasury is the lifeblood of the state.
cards.speech_right_en: A given word must be kept, Pasha.

cards.text: Barış döneminde savaş harcamaları azaldı. Bu tasarrufu nereye yönlendireceğiz? Hazine mi dolsun, yoksa bayındırlık mı?
cards.speech_right: Taş üstüne taş koymak devlet kurar.
cards.text_en: In a period of peace, war expenditures have decreased. Where shall we direct these savings? Fill the treasury, or invest?
cards.speech_left_en: Caution is worth gold.
cards.speech_right_en: Stone upon stone — that is how a state is built.

cards.text: Paşam, yıllardır size olan desteğim boşa gitmiyor. Ocak içinde adınız saygıyla anılıyor. Bir şey sormak istedim: bize güveniyor musunuz?
cards.text_en: Pasha, my support for you over the years has not been in vain. Your name is spoken with respect inside the corps. May I ask a favor?
cards.left_text_en: I trust you, but you have limits
cards.speech_left_en: Drawing a boundary is also a form of security.
cards.speech_right_en: A word is more durable than a sword.

cards.text: Geçen sefer ricamı kırmadınız. Bunu unutmadım. Size küçük bir karşılık yapmak istiyorum — Harem'in desteği sizin.
cards.text_en: Last time you did not refuse my request. I have not forgotten this. I wish to offer a small token in return — the Harem's support in a difficult matter.
cards.left_text_en: No need — you were doing your duty
cards.speech_left_en: Do not embarrass us, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Loyalty does not go unrewarded.

cards.text: Sadrazam, son zamanlarda tekliflerimi çok reddettiniz. Haklı nedenleriniz olduğunu biliyorum ama Sultanın sabrının da sınırı var.
cards.text_en: Grand Vizier, lately you have refused many of my proposals. I know you have valid reasons, but the Sultan's patience is not infinite.
cards.right_text_en: My decisions are for the state's good
cards.speech_left_en: The wise man knows when to step back.
cards.speech_right_en: The state is above the individual.

cards.text: Şehzadenin evliliğinin ardından Kırım Hanı ile ilişkilerimiz güçlendi. Ama Şehzade artık kendi çıkarlarını düşünmeye başladı.
cards.text_en: After the prince's marriage, our relations with the Khan of Crimea have strengthened. But the prince is now pursuing his own interests.
cards.speech_left_en: When the tree grows, so does its shadow.
cards.speech_right_en: Family bonds are state bonds.

cards.text: Yıl sonu vergi tahsilatı tamamlandı. Valiler beklenenden iyi sonuç getirdi. Hazine bu dönem doldu.
cards.text_en: Year-end tax collection is complete. The governors brought better results than expected. The treasury has filled this period.
cards.speech_left_en: The state endures, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: Numbers do not lie.

cards.text: Bu mevsim ticaret yolları açık kaldı. Gümrük ve pazar vergileri bekleneni aştı.
cards.text_en: This season the trade routes stayed open. Customs and market taxes exceeded expectations.
cards.speech_left_en: Trade is the vein, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The state takes its share.

cards.text: Paşam, Viyana üzerine sefer planları hazır. Ordu güçlü, zaman doğru. Bu fırsatı kaçırırsak bir daha bu güce ulaşamayız.
cards.text_en: Pasha, the plans for the campaign on Vienna are ready. The army is strong, the time is right. If we miss this chance, another may never come.
cards.left_text_en: Too soon for the campaign — wait
cards.speech_left_en: Reason comes before courage.
cards.speech_right_en: History will write about us, Pasha.

cards.text: Sultan, yeni bir kanunname hazırlatmak istiyor. İslam hukukuyla Osmanlı örfünü harmanlamanız gerekecek. Hassas bir denge.
cards.text_en: The Sultan wants a new code of law drawn up. You will need to blend Islamic law with Ottoman custom.
cards.speech_left_en: God's law is supreme.
cards.speech_right_en: The state keeps the law alive.

cards.text: Memlükler zayıfladı, Mısır açık. Sultan Ridaniye'de Memlük ordusunu ezmeyi planlıyor. Deniz desteği için hazır mısınız?
cards.text_en: The Mamluks have weakened and Egypt is open. The Sultan plans to crush the Mamluk army at Ridaniyya. Fleet support is needed.
cards.left_text_en: The fleet is not ready — wait
cards.speech_left_en: Haste makes waste.
cards.speech_right_en: Think of Egypt's gold!

cards.text: Doğu Anadolu'daki Şii topluluklar Safevi propagandasıyla kışkırtılıyor. Sultan sert bir fetva bekliyor. Ulema ne yapacak?
cards.text_en: The Shia communities in eastern Anatolia are being stirred up by Safavid propaganda. The Sultan expects a stern fatwa.
cards.speech_left_en: Justice, not vengeance.
cards.speech_right_en: The Sultan's patience must not overflow.

cards.text: Harem'deki cariyeler arasında güç savaşı had safhaya ulaştı. Sultan'ın gözde kadınları birbirini zehirlemeye çalışıyor. Müdahale lazım.
cards.text_en: The power struggle among the concubines in the Harem has reached its peak. The Sultan's favorites are rumored to be poisoning each other.
cards.left_text_en: The Harem is an internal matter — do not interfere
cards.speech_left_en: Do not add fuel to the fire.
cards.speech_right_en: Palace order is necessary for all.

cards.text: Safevilerle çatışma yeniden alevlendi. Tebriz'e sefer planlanıyor. Sipahiler hazır ama Yeniçeriler isteksiz.
cards.text_en: The conflict with the Safavids has flared up again. A campaign toward Tabriz is being planned. The cavalry are ready but the Janissaries are reluctant.
cards.speech_left_en: Every war has its price.
cards.speech_right_en: Tabriz will be ours!

cards.text: Haber aldım: Rakip Vezir ile Valide Sultan gizlice görüştü. İkisi birlikte size karşı plan yapıyor olabilir. Ne yapacaksınız?
cards.text_en: I have learned: the Rival Vizier and the Valide Sultan met in secret. It seems the two are plotting against you together.
cards.speech_left_en: The shadows are talking, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: The Sultan must know everything.

cards.text: Şeyhülislam, Hekimbaşı'nın 'bid'at ilaçları' kullandığını iddia ediyor. İkisi arasında açık çatışma var. Taraf mı tutacaksınız?
cards.text_en: The Şeyhülislam claims the Chief Physician uses 'heretical medicines.' Open conflict between the two has begun.
cards.speech_left_en: Learning is not the enemy of faith.
cards.speech_right_en: Faith comes first.

cards.text: Kaptan-ı Derya ile Yeniçeri Ağası arasında kaynak çatışması var. İkisi de sizden daha fazla pay istiyor ve birbirini şikayet ediyor.
cards.text_en: There is a resource conflict between the Admiral of the Fleet and the Janissary Commander. Both want a larger share from you.
cards.speech_left_en: Balance always wins.
cards.speech_right_en: Land forces come before the sea.

cards.text: Büyük Tüccar ve Yahudi Bankacı ortak bir proje için izin istiyor. Birlikte çalışmaları hem güçlü hem tehlikeli.
cards.text_en: The Grand Merchant and the Jewish Banker are requesting permission for a joint project. Their collaboration is powerful — but also risky.
cards.speech_left_en: Monopolies are dangerous.
cards.speech_right_en: Unity is strength, Pasha.

cards.text: Casuslar Başı, Defterdar'ın bazı gizli hesaplarına erişti. Zimmet mi yoksa gizli bir proje mi — bilmiyorum. Size bildirdim.
cards.text_en: The Head of Spies has accessed some of the Treasurer's secret accounts. Embezzlement, or a covert project — unknown.
cards.speech_left_en: Someone will answer for this.
cards.speech_right_en: Eyes are everywhere, Pasha.

cards.text: Viyana surları önünde durduk. Kış yaklaşıyor, erzak azalıyor. Başka yıl denemek mi, yoksa kuşatmayı zorlamak mı?
cards.text_en: We halted before the walls of Vienna. Winter is approaching, supplies are dwindling. Retreat and wait for another year, or press the siege?
cards.speech_left_en: A wise commander knows when to retreat.
cards.speech_right_en: We have come this far, Pasha.

cards.text: Mısır seferinin ardından Memlük hazineleri ele geçirildi. Bu serveti nasıl kullanacağız? Ordu mu, inşaat mı, devlet kasası mı?
cards.text_en: After the Egyptian campaign, the Mamluk treasuries were seized. How shall we use this wealth? Army, infrastructure, or the treasury?
cards.right_text_en: Invest in the army and public works
cards.speech_left_en: Saving is the foundation of wealth.
cards.speech_right_en: He who spends, gains, Pasha.

cards.text: Tuna cephesinde Avusturya ile müzakere çöktü. Uzun bir savaş kapıda. Sipahiler moral olarak zayıf, Yeniçeriler isteksiz.
cards.text_en: Negotiations with Austria on the Danube front have collapsed. A long war is at the door. The cavalry morale is low, the Janissaries are ready.
cards.speech_left_en: Peace brings gain, Pasha.
cards.speech_right_en: History loves its heroes.

cards.text: İstanbul'da büyük bir yangın çıktı. Yüzlerce hane kül oldu. Halk yardım bekliyor, inşaat için kaynağa ihtiyaç var.
cards.text_en: A great fire broke out in Istanbul. Hundreds of homes were turned to ash. The people are waiting for help and resources for reconstruction.
cards.left_text_en: Let the people find their own solution
cards.speech_left_en: The state's power has limits.
cards.speech_right_en: The people see the state here.

cards.text: Büyük veba dalgası İstanbul'a ulaştı. Her gün yüzlerce kişi ölüyor. Tarih bu felaketi yazıyor. Ne yapılacak?
cards.text_en: The great plague wave has reached Istanbul. Hundreds die every day. History is writing down this calamity. What will you do?
cards.left_text_en: Prayer and patience — submit to fate
cards.speech_left_en: Death comes from God.
cards.speech_right_en: The state protects, Pasha.

cards.text: Paşam, doğudan büyük bir düşman ordusu geliyor. Sınır kuvvetlerimiz yetersiz. Savaşa mı gireceğiz yoksa anlaşma mı arayacağız? Vakit dar.
cards.text_en: Pasha, a great enemy army is coming from the east. Our border forces are insufficient. Shall we go to war, or seek a settlement?
cards.speech_left_en: A solution without bloodshed.
cards.speech_right_en: Victory or martyrdom!

cards.text: Paşam, düşman geliyor. Ama Yeniçeri ocağı sizin yanında — ilişkimiz güçlü, askerler güveniyor size. Emir verin, savaşalım mı?
cards.text_en: Pasha, the enemy is coming. But the Janissary corps stands with you — our relationship is strong, the soldiers trust you. Your orders?
cards.speech_left_en: The corps awaits your command.
