cards.text: Bir Fransız tüccarın Osmanlı mahkemesinde yargılanması gerekiyor; elçisi müdahale ediyor. Dokunulmazlık talep ediyorlar. Kabul mü etmeliyiz?
cards.text_en: A French merchant needs to be tried in an Ottoman court — his ambassador is intervening, claiming diplomatic immunity. Shall we accept this?
cards.left_text_en: The Ottoman court will try him
cards.speech_left_en: Justice must be blind.
cards.speech_right_en: The state must always win.

cards.text: Paşam, kimliğim tehlikede. Beni takip ediyorlar. Hemen İstanbul'a dönebilirim ama operasyon yarım kalır. Ne yapayım?
cards.text_en: Pasha, my identity is at risk. I am being followed. I can return to Istanbul immediately — but the operation will be left half-done. What shall I do?
cards.speech_left_en: Knowledge is power — its time will come.
cards.speech_right_en: Do not miss this opportunity!

cards.text: Paşam, bir rakip güç bana teklif yaptı. Çift taraf oynarsam daha fazla bilgi toplayabilirim; ama yakalanırsam kriz çıkar. İzin veriyor musunuz?
cards.investigate_text: Casuslar Başı: 'Çift taraf oyunları nadiren işe yarar ve genelde felaketle biter.'
cards.text_en: Pasha, a rival power has made me an offer. If I play both sides, I can gather more information — but if caught, it will cause a crisis. Do you give permission?
cards.investigate_text_en: Spymaster: 'Double games rarely work and usually end in disaster.'
cards.speech_left_en: Knowledge is power — its time will come.
cards.speech_right_en: Do not miss this opportunity!

cards.text: Paşam, hedef ülkenin savunma planlarının bir kopyasını ele geçirebilirim. Ama bu iş yüksek risk; ajan ağımın tamamı tehlikeye girebilir.
cards.text_en: Pasha, I can obtain a copy of the target country's defense plans. But this is high-risk; my entire agent network could be endangered.
cards.left_text_en: Do not take the risk — protect the network
cards.right_text_en: Get the plans — take the risk
cards.speech_left_en: Knowledge is power — its time will come.
cards.speech_right_en: Do not miss this opportunity!

cards.text: Paşam, yıllardır sahte kimlikle yaşıyorum. Yoruldum. Asıl kimliğime kavuşmak istiyorum; ama operasyon bitmedi. Ne yapayım?
cards.text_en: Pasha, I have been living under a false identity for years. I am exhausted. I want to return to my true self — but the operation is not over. What shall I do?
cards.left_text_en: Wait until the mission is complete
cards.speech_left_en: Knowledge is power — its time will come.
cards.speech_right_en: Do not miss this opportunity!

cards.text: Paşam, halk önümüzdeki Cuma meydanda toplanmak istiyor. Talepler belgelenmiş. Bu toplanmayı izinli hale getirelim mi, yoksa durduralım mı?
cards.speech_right: Halk bizi dinledi, biz de halkı.
cards.text_en: Pasha, the people want to gather in the square this Friday. The demands have been documented. Shall we make this gathering official — or stop it?
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience has a limit.
cards.speech_right_en: The people listened to us, and we listened to them.

cards.text: Halkın taleplerini yazılı dilekçeyle Sultana sunmak istiyorum. Bu, meşru bir başvuru; ama Sultana doğrudan ulaşmaya kim izin verir?
cards.speech_right: Halk bizi dinledi, biz de halkı.
cards.text_en: I wish to present the people's demands to the Sultan in a written petition. This is a legitimate request — but who grants access directly to the Sultan?
cards.left_text_en: I cannot arrange access to the Sultan
cards.right_text_en: I will convey the petition to the Sultan
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience has a limit.
cards.speech_right_en: The people listened to us, and we listened to them.

cards.text: Divan'da biri halk önderini sürgüne göndermemi öneriyor. Bu adım huzuru sağlar mı yoksa yeni isyan tohumları eker mi?
cards.speech_right: Halk bizi dinledi, biz de halkı.
cards.text_en: Someone in the Divan is suggesting I exile the people's leader. Will this step bring peace — or sow seeds of new revolt?
cards.left_text_en: Do not send him to exile
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience has a limit.
cards.speech_right_en: The people listened to us, and we listened to them.

cards.text: Paşam, gergin bir mahallede iki grup arasında kavga çıkmak üzere. Halk önderi olarak arabulucu olmayı teklif ediyorum. Yetki veriyor musunuz?
cards.speech_right: Halk bizi dinledi, biz de halkı.
cards.text_en: Pasha, a fight is about to break out between two groups in a tense neighbourhood. As people's leader, I offer to mediate. Will you grant me the authority?
cards.right_text_en: Grant the authority — let him mediate
cards.speech_left_en: The people's patience has a limit.
cards.speech_right_en: The people listened to us, and we listened to them.

cards.text: Paşam, çantamda İbn Rüşd'ün bazı eserleri var; Şeyhülislam bunları bid'at sayıyor. Ulema denetlemek istiyor. Kitaplarım incelensin mi?
cards.text_en: Pasha, I have some works of Ibn Rushd in my bag; the Şeyhülislam considers them heresy. The ulema wants to examine them. Shall my books be inspected?
cards.right_text_en: Let the ulema inspect the books
cards.speech_left_en: The door to the wise cannot be closed.
cards.speech_right_en: The East's secret lies with the Ottomans.

cards.text: Paşam, yanımda yetiştirdiğim bir öğrenci var; ileride büyük alim olacak. Ama ailesi onu geri istiyor. Kalması için destek verir misiniz?
cards.text_en: Pasha, I have a student I have trained by my side — he will become a great scholar. But his family wants him back. Will you support his staying?
cards.right_text_en: Support the student — let him stay
cards.speech_left_en: The door to the wise cannot be closed.
cards.speech_right_en: The East's secret lies with the Ottomans.

cards.text: Semerkand'daki gibi bir rasathane İstanbul'a çok şey katar. Takvim, coğrafya, denizcilik — hepsinde fayda. Kurulmasına öncülük eder misiniz?
cards.text_en: An observatory like the one in Samarkand would add great value to Istanbul. Calendar, geography, navigation — benefits in all. Will you champion its establishment?
cards.left_text_en: The ulema will not approve — not now
cards.speech_left_en: The door to the wise cannot be closed.
cards.speech_right_en: The East's secret lies with the Ottomans.

cards.text: Osmanlı ulemasıyla felsefi tartışma yapmak istiyorum. Onlar hazır değil; ama bu tartışma ilmi seviyeyi yükseltir. İzin veriyor musunuz?
cards.text_en: I wish to hold a philosophical debate with the Ottoman ulema. They may not be ready — but this debate would raise the scholarly level. Do you give permission?
cards.speech_left_en: The door to the wise cannot be closed.
cards.speech_right_en: The East's secret lies with the Ottomans.
